scripts.test: npm run mongo:start && cross-env NODE_ENV=test node --test; npm run mongo:stop
scripts.test:blog: npm run mongo:start && cross-env NODE_ENV=test node --test ./tests/blog_api.test.js; npm run mongo:stop
scripts.mongo:start: docker run -d --name bloglist_mongodb_test -p 27017:27017 -e MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME=admin -e MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD=password mongo
scripts.mongo:stop: docker stop bloglist_mongodb_test && docker rm bloglist_mongodb_test
